channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Elevated blood pressure at discharge from delivery hospitalization predicts earlier admission postpartum
item.description: 1. Blood pressure ≥140/90 mmHg at discharge predicts earlier postpartum admission but does not predict severity of hypertensive disease at readmission...

item.title: Early healthy eating shapes lifelong brain health, new research finds

item.title: Hematology Advanced NPs Score High on Satisfaction

item.title: FDA proposes new system for approving customized drugs and therapies for rare diseases

item.title: Combo Pill for Treating Hypertension Shows Positive Results
item.description: A low-dose, single-pill combination proved to be as effective as — and in some cases, superior to — standard-dose monotherapy for treating hypertensio...

item.title: New drug candidate prevents preterm birth in preclinical studies
item.description: New research shows that Rytvela, an anti-inflammatory drug candidate, decreased premature birth and infant mortality when administered after the onset...

item.title: PET/CT Can Catch Cranial GCA Missed by Doppler Ultrasound
item.description: Digital FDG PET/CT can pick up cranial giant cell arteritis that may be missed on ultrasound because of a lack of trunk large-vessel involvement. Meds...

item.title: Landmark UK Birth After Deceased Womb Donation
item.description: Clinicians have delivered the UK’s first baby after a womb transplant from a deceased donor, marking a surgical milestone. Press Association

item.title: Heat-Related Emergency Calls Vary by Region and Age

item.title: Team creativity emerges as catalyst for high-quality primary patient care, lower burnout, and greater job satisfaction

item.title: Children born with upper limb difference show the incredible adaptability of the young brain

item.title: Physicians slightly more likely to die at home or hospice

item.title: Prenatal depression and gestational diabetes are associated with increased risk of childhood obesity
